hair,
And hands that shower boons and give protection,
Which hold the crystal chain of beads and books.
171
Aghori.it

kavīndrāṇāṃ cetaḥ kamalavana-bālātapa-ruciṃ
bhajante ye santaḥ katicidaruṇāmeva bhavatīm |
viriñci-preyasyā-staruṇatara-śrṛṅgara laharī-
gabhīrābhi-rvāgbhiḥ rvidadhati satāṃ rañjanamamī || 16 ||
Mantra: vaṃ vaṃ vaṃ
16 (Mastery of Vedas)
She who is the purple luster of the dawn,
To the lotus forest like mind,
Of the kings of poets of the world,
And thus called Aruna - the purple colored one,
Creates happiness in the mind of the holy,
With tender passionate wave of words,
(Of Sarasvati the darling of Brahma,)
Which are royal and youthful.
172
Aghori.it

savitrībhi-rvācāṃ caśi-maṇi śilā-bhaṅga rucibhi-
rvaśinyadyābhi-stvāṃ saha janani sañcintayati yaḥ |
sa kartā kāvyānāṃ bhavati mahatāṃ bhaṅgirucibhi-
rvacobhi-rvāgdevī-vadana-kamalāmoda madhuraiḥ || 17 ||
Mantra: aiṃ aiṃ aiṃ
17 (Mastery over words. Knowledge of science)
